title: Undocker part 1)
body:
Create dedicated packages:
* pkg/signal for signal handling
* pkg/capabilities for all-things caps

Especially `pkg/capabilities` will come in handy for #5206.

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
The rdoproject.org/github-check is starting to get annoying. Although it's not blocking, it causes the CI to be red for way too long.
Should this be happening in github.com/containers/common so that buildah can take advantage?

> Should this be happening in github.com/containers/common so that buildah can take advantage?

I prefer to wait until we separate Podman from libpod. This will allow for Buildah to use more packages from libpod.
Personally, if the end goal is to get the packages into common eventually, I'd say move 'em now even if other pkg's from Libpod go later.  Your call.
